script:
set +e
echo '=== confirm current mode/owner of master ==='
stat -c '%a %U:%G %n' /home/azureuser/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo '=== xattrs / special flags ==='
lsattr /home/azureuser/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
getfattr -d -m - /home/azureuser/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo '=== control test: fresh test file group-readable ==='
T=/home/azureuser/.claude/test-perm-$$
echo secret-content > "$T"
chown azureuser:azureuser "$T"
chmod 0640 "$T"
ls -l "$T"
echo '--- aixa read of fresh test file ---'
runuser -u aixa -- head -c 30 "$T" 2>&1
echo
rm -f "$T"
echo '=== control test 2: put fresh file in aixa home, group azureuser ==='
T2=/home/aixa/test-perm-$$
echo secret > "$T2"
chown azureuser:azureuser "$T2"; chmod 0640 "$T2"
ls -l "$T2"
runuser -u aixa -- head -c 30 "$T2" 2>&1
echo
rm -f "$T2"
echo '=== /home/azureuser/.claude perms ==='
stat -c '%a %U:%G %n' /home/azureuser /home/azureuser/.claude 2>&1
echo '===END==='
